message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>
                  The Delta variant originally from India is rapidly spreading across the world and causes to resurge infections of SARS-CoV-2. We previously reported that CT-P59 presented its
                  <jats:italic>in vivo</jats:italic>
                  potency against Beta and Gamma variants, despite its reduced activity in cell experiments. Yet, it remains uncertain to exert the antiviral effect of CT-P59 on the Delta and its associated variants (L452R). To tackle this question, we carried out cell tests and animal study. CT-P59 showed reduced antiviral activity but enabled neutralization against Delta, Epsilon, and Kappa variants in cells. In line with
                  <jats:italic>in vitro</jats:italic>
                  results, the mouse challenge experiment with the Delta variant substantiated
                  <jats:italic>in vivo</jats:italic>
                  potency of CT-P59 showing symptom remission and virus abrogation in the respiratory tract. Collectively, cell and animal studies showed that CT-P59 is effective against the Delta variant infection, hinting that CT-P59 has therapeutic potency for patients infected with Delta and its associated variants.
                </jats:p>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>Highlights</jats:title>
                  <jats:list list-type="bullet">
                    <jats:list-item>
                      <jats:p>CT-P59 exerts the antiviral effect on authentic Delta, Epsilon and Kappa variants in cell-based experiments.</jats:p>
                    </jats:list-item>
                    <jats:list-item>
                      <jats:p>CT-P59 showed neutralizing potency against variants including Delta, Epsilon, Kappa, L452R, T478K and P681H pseudovirus variants.</jats:p>
                    </jats:list-item>
                    <jats:list-item>
                      <jats:p>
                        The administration of clinically relevant dose of CT-P59 showed
                        <jats:italic>in vivo</jats:italic>
                      </jats:p>
                    </jats:list-item>
                    <jats:list-item>
                      <jats:p>protection against Delta variants in animal challenge experiment.</jats:p>
                    </jats:list-item>
                  </jats:list>
                </jats:sec>
title: The in vitro and in vivo potency of CT-P59 against Delta and its associated variants of SARS-CoV-2
